appraisal_events.evidence: « une ennuyeuse et docile captive »; « je lui avais coupé les ailes… elle était une pesante esclave dont j’aurais voulu me débarrasser »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Albertine as transformed by confinement, losing her past liveliness to become a docile and heavy captive; this characterization significantly diminishes her.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, she is belittled by the insistent description of her captive docility and the loss of her former vitality.
